title: Instant AI Initialization (v10.1.4) ⚡
message: We've resolved a critical issue preventing offline AI models from booting correctly when opening the app. Your local AI is now instantly ready to code whenever you are!
points: ✅ Fixed a bug where the AI engine failed to start on the first launch.
🚀 Improved memory allocation for faster, crash-free cold starts.

title: Critical AI Fixes (v10.1.3) 🛠️
message: We've resolved the download and initialization issues for the offline AI engines! Important: If you use the Standard or High Power models, please delete and re-download them in the AI Configuration menu.
points: ✅ Fixed offline AI model downloads and stability.
⚠️ Action Required: Re-download Standard/High Power models to apply fixes.
💬 Fixed missing AI chat responses in the editor.

title: Limitless AI Update (v10.1.0) 🚀
message: Take your coding to the next level with our brand new Smart Debugger and Magic Inputs. Update now to unlock these powerful tools!
points: 🧠 On-Device AI with offline support, no limits, and full privacy.
🛠️ Smart AI Debugger for instant error explanation and auto-fix.
📑 AI Sub-Tabs to keep your file workspace clean and organized.
🪄 Magic Input Detection for automatic stdin handling.
🔄 Easily switch between Cloud AI and Local AI on the fly.

title: A Massive Leap Forward (v10.0.0) ✨
message: Experience the next generation of development with our biggest update yet. 100% Offline AI is finally here.
points: 🔥 DevDuo High Power - Advanced reasoning (8GB+ RAM).
🔒 Run fully offline with zero internet dependency and absolute privacy.
